rules.name: SSH brute force
rules.description: Repeated SSH failed logins from the same source IP within a short window.

rules.name: Invalid user login
rules.description: Login attempt with an invalid or non-existent username.

rules.name: Sudo sensitive file access
rules.description: Use of sudo to access sensitive files such as /etc/shadow or /etc/sudoers.

rules.name: SQL injection attempt
rules.description: Classic SQL injection patterns in HTTP request.

rules.name: XSS attempt
rules.description: Cross-site scripting payload in HTTP request.

rules.name: Directory traversal
rules.description: Path traversal attempt to access files outside web root.

rules.name: Admin panel probing
rules.description: Requests to common admin/management panel paths.

rules.name: Suspicious scanner user-agent
rules.description: User-Agent header matching known scanners (sqlmap, nikto, nmap).

rules.name: Curl suspicious access
rules.description: curl/wget user agent accessing sensitive paths.

rules.name: Port scan
rules.description: Many denied connections to many distinct destination ports from one source.

rules.name: Repeated firewall deny
rules.description: Repeated DENY events from the same source IP within a short window.

rules.name: Suspicious outbound connection
rules.description: Outbound ALLOW to a non-standard port that looks like C2 (e.g., 4444, 1337, 8081 with periodic pattern).

rules.name: DGA-like DNS query
rules.description: DNS query for a domain with a long random-looking subdomain (DGA indicator).

rules.name: Repeated NXDOMAIN
rules.description: Many NXDOMAIN responses for the same client within a short window.

rules.name: C2-like beacon pattern
rules.description: Repeated DNS queries to the same suspicious domain at regular intervals.

rules.name: Web 404 scan burst
rules.description: Many 404 responses from the same source IP in a short window.

rules.name: Suspicious encoded payload
rules.description: Detect URL-encoded payloads commonly used for evasion.

rules.name: Credential dumping hint
rules.description: Access to credential stores like /etc/shadow or SAM hive.

rules.name: Command execution probe
rules.description: Possible command injection patterns in HTTP request.

rules.name: Broad scanning pattern
rules.description: Many distinct request paths from a single source IP in a short window.
